claim_boundary.claim_ceiling: provisional CT3 replay-backed same-basin transfer candidate; stress, full control classification, final transfer, native AP5, AP5 NAT4-gap resolution, Phase 8, and ant ecology remain blocked

purpose: Replay the I4 and I4-A CT2 candidates and test whether same-basin mapping evidence is stable under artifact, snapshot/load, duplicate, and mapping-order replay.

replay_rows.ap4_condition_reason: I4 mapping does not use route-conditioned selection; AP4 remains recorded as conditional inherited context only.
replay_rows.ap5_condition_reason: I4 does not use proxy or target formation; N26 scoped AP5 context is not consumed as native AP5 or transfer evidence.
replay_rows.claim_ceiling: provisional CT3 replay-backed same-basin transfer candidate pending I6 stress, I7 controls/classification, and I8 closeout; no final transfer, semantic identity, native support, native AP5, AP5 NAT4-gap resolution, Phase 8, or ant ecology claim
